# allocQueue

**Instance Property**

Wrapper to return instances of the IOHIDQueueInterface.

## Declaration

```swift
IOHIDQueueInterface **(*allocQueue)(void *self);
```

## Return Value

Returns the created IOHIDQueueInterface.
